_comment: CI-GUARDRAILS-V1 banned classes & CSS vars. Add new entries when an archive identifies a new historical mistake. See tools/ci/check-banned-classes.mjs.
_calibration_v1: Removed --font-display from css_var_patterns: it is declared in globals.css, used in 116 places, and effectively a legitimate token despite original Project file note. If you want to migrate away from it later, reintroduce in a dedicated archive that handles the refactor.

_notes.exact_classes: Matched in className="...", class="...", clsx(...), cn(...) etc. Word-boundary safe.
_notes.css_var_patterns: Matched as `var(--name)` in any source file. Use even if the variable is locally declared — these are blacklisted by historical convention.
_notes.skip_directive: Add a comment containing @ci-skip-banned-classes in the first 5 lines of a file to skip it (use sparingly, document why).
